name: Bomb Box
description: A box type that arms a countdown the moment it's revealed. Tap it before the timer hits zero to defuse it and release the marbles — or let it explode and lose the box's contents.
howToPlay: Bomb boxes arm automatically when they become visible. Watch the red countdown on each bomb. Tap a bomb box before it hits zero to defuse it and drop its marbles onto the belt. If a bomb reaches zero, it explodes — no marbles for you! Clear the blue sort columns to win.
author: Quentin Correggi
